svg.title: Bar chart showing cost per WELLBY across charity groups. Top 5 LMIC charities ($18) are 151 times cheaper than UK charities ($2,714). Pure Earth ($9) is 916 times more cost-effective than the least cost-effective evaluated charity, Football Beyond Borders ($8,691) and 3366 times more cost-effective than an average of Guide Dogs and helping with homelessness ($31,929).
